hero.hero_subheadline: Direct access to institutional-grade, off-market residential redevelopments and value-add opportunities. Structured for professional real estate investors.

approach.title: Data-Driven Underwriting
approach.description: We verify structural conditions, historical comps, building permits, and zoning codes to package every asset with absolute quantitative transparency. No speculative assumptions.

approach.title: Off-Market Sourcing
approach.description: Our proprietary acquisition engine targets distressed portfolios, estate probates, and bank-owned liquidations before they ever touch the MLS or public aggregators.

approach.title: Institutional Alignment
approach.description: We match target inventory directly to your unique buy-box parameters. We do not blast deals to large public databases; we curate placement for active sponsors.

approach.title: Structured Execution
approach.description: From immediate title clearance to active escrow management, our transactional desks operate with extreme discipline to guarantee friction-free closings.

principles.title: Rigorous Margin of Safety
principles.description: Every offering is packaged with a minimum 25% discount compared to current local market comparable values, providing immediate equity cushion.

principles.title: Dual-Exit Underwriting
principles.description: We stress-test all asset packages against multiple exit strategies: immediate redevelopment arbitrage or stabilized high-yield portfolio rental holding.

principles.title: Clean Title Guarantee
principles.description: We do not market properties with cloud titles or unresolved municipal liens. Every transaction undergoes rigorous pre-escrow title auditing.

principles.title: Verified Rehab Diagnostics
principles.description: We build itemized cost sheets based on real-time contractor quotes and material indexes, minimizing budget overruns during execution.

dos: Experienced sponsors and renovators with active field crews
Buy-and-hold operators seeking reliable 7%+ net cap rates
Institutional funds looking for scalable, packaged asset volume
Liquid buyers with proof of funds ready to execute in under 14 days
donts: Wholesale brokers looking to co-market, daisy-chain, or assign contracts
Retail owner-occupants looking for primary residences
Speculators requiring financing contingencies or extended escrow terms
Brokers attempting to split commission without direct principal representation

schedule.section_subtitle: Book directly to review your buy box and confirm deal access.
schedule.intro_desc: Quick intro to learn about your goals, markets, and how I can help.
schedule.deep_dive_desc: Deep dive into your buy box, funding, and strategy. Deal access setup after call.

faqs.question: How do you source your off-market properties?
faqs.answer: We source our inventory directly from owners through targeted outbound marketing, partnerships with estate executors, bankruptcy administrators, and direct relationships with institutional lenders. Every asset is held under a direct contract before we present it to our buyer pool.

faqs.question: What does your underwriting process include?
faqs.answer: Every asset includes a comprehensive underwriting packet consisting of certified desktop valuations, local comparable sales analysis, preliminary title reports from our preferred title partners, and an itemized structural assessment with projected rehabilitation costs.

faqs.question: Do you allow financing or inspection contingencies?
faqs.answer: To secure deep discounts, we purchase assets on an as-is, all-cash basis. Consequently, we require our buyers to perform their due diligence prior to submitting an offer. Contracts are executed with non-refundable deposits and zero financing or inspection contingencies.

faqs.question: How do I get added to the exclusive buyer list?
faqs.answer: You must complete our onboarding questionnaire detailing your target buy-box (asset class, geography, budget) and submit verified proof of funds. This ensures we only present matching, actionable transactions directly to your acquisition team.
